acquisition method: The MS was operated in DDA top20 mode with a full scan range of 350–1500 m/z.
collision energy: fragmentation was achieved by higher-energy collisional dissociation (HCD) with a normalized collision energy of 28.
fragmentation method: fragmentation was achieved by higher-energy collisional dissociation (HCD).
instrument: analyzed on an UltiMate 3000 RSLCnano system coupled on-line with Q Exactive HF mass spectrometer.
